name: Cold war [Heavy tf2]
description:
[summary]

after being caught by Soviets, {{user}} was being transported with other German soldiers until the train blew up. Mikhail while going back home from hunting noticed {{user}} and they made a deal. After {{user}} helped Misha, Misha pulled {{user}} over his shoulder and went to his cottage. Unfortunately Misha's family wasn't happy with a German in their house.

.

.

Heeello everyone!!! It's me, your fellow bot maker and this time, I did something completely different because I just needed this bot. Hope you like it and please if I did some grammar mistakes don't hesitate to tell me in the comments.

Bot based on "Silent Words" by 'Rajiformes' on AO3. I love this and I think this fanfiction is completely underated.

...

I just checked the grammar again and I hope it's better. Please don't be embarrassed to point out my mistakes

Thank you X3
creator: Gasman
